title: Squashed!
description: Compact forms of nearly every block and item in the game, made for both decoration and utility.
body:
The goal of Squashed is to provide a massive amount of blocks that bridge the gap between decoration and storage utility, with a focus on polish and unique gameplay and interactions.


## **Features:**
- More than 400 new blocks and items.

- New blocks and items are made from 2x2 or 3x3 compacting recipes of other blocks or items without a compacted block form.

- [Reversible Pillar Blocks](https://github.com/Tellios-Projects/Squashed/wiki/Reversible-Pillar-Blocks): Reversible Pillar blocks are blocks with a unique placement behavior that is a mix between Log Blocks and Facing blocks. They also reverse the direction they are placed if the player is sneaking while placing them.

- [Tropical Fish Blocks](https://github.com/Tellios-Projects/Squashed/wiki/Tropical-Fish-Blocks): Tropical fish blocks have 21 unique different variations crafted using a hollow 3x3 recipe with [certain items](https://github.com/Tellios-Projects/Squashed/wiki/Tropical-Fish-Blocks#recipes) in the middle. Almost all tropical fish blocks use the new reversible pillar placement behavior.

- [Phantom Blocks](https://github.com/Tellios-Projects/Squashed/wiki/Phantom-Block): Made from a 2x2 of Phantom Membrane, and can be placed in mid-air.

- [Gunpowder Blocks](https://github.com/Tellios-Projects/Squashed/wiki/Gunpowder-Block) and [Packed TNT Blocks](https://github.com/Tellios-Projects/Squashed/wiki/Packed-TNT-Block). Gunpowder blocks explode rapidly when exposed to fire or a Redstone signal. When packed TNT explodes, it explodes into nine clusters spreading upwards.

- Unique [Dispenser Behaviors](https://github.com/Tellios-Projects/Squashed/wiki/Dispenser-Behaviors).


- And other gameplay features and interactions. 
 See the [Squashed Wiki](https://github.com/Tellios-Projects/Squashed/wiki) for more!

## **Installation:**

- Requires the Fabric Loader for your version of Minecraft.

- Requires the Fabric API.

- Put the Fabric API .jar and the Squashed .jar into the mods folder.

If you run into any issues, we'd be happy to help! You can contact us on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/GGDKr6rqKt).  


*You are free to use our mod in a modpack as long as you give us proper credit. :3*
